hero.subtitleLine2: For kids aged 6-18 who want to change the world.

sections.pathsSubtitle: Programs designed for each age group, with adapted and progressive content.

features.title: Robotics Programming
features.description: Build real robots. Code real solutions. Experience real technological adventures.

features.title: Soft Skills & Creativity
features.description: Develop confidence, communication, and leadership in a supportive environment.

features.title: Fun Competitions
features.description: Take on team challenges, celebrate every victory, and become an innovation champion.

steps.title: Choose your path
steps.description: Select the program suited to your age and interests.

steps.title: Learn by creating
steps.description: Concrete projects, fun challenges, passionate instructors.

steps.title: Earn your badge
steps.description: Validate your skills with recognized certificates.

testimonials.name: Sonia B.
testimonials.text: My daughter comes back from her classes with stars in her eyes. InnovaLearn transformed her approach to learning.

testimonials.name: Karim M.
testimonials.text: In 3 months my son coded his first video game. I still can't believe it. Amazing team!

testimonials.name: Amira T.
testimonials.text: Sofia talks about her robots to all her friends. The pedagogy is perfect for creative kids.

testimonials.name: Mehdi R.
testimonials.text: Super coaching and very clear progression. Rayen became more confident after only a few weeks.

testimonials.name: Nour H.
testimonials.text: The classes are playful and structured at the same time. She loves showing us her mini projects.

testimonials.name: Wassim K.
testimonials.text: Excellent environment and serious mentors. Adam now spends his free time building useful apps.

testimonials.name: Rim S.
testimonials.text: A modern way of teaching with real outcomes. We noticed major growth in problem-solving skills.

testimonials.name: Hichem D.
testimonials.text: The quality is professional and motivating. Nader now plans to pursue robotics in high school.

footer.descriptionLine2: Empowering learners with tools that inspire
